milestone: M3 — Fyers Historical Data, Replay & Backtesting
triggers: Financial / research-integrity logic: backtest P&L, train/test/holdout discipline, and statistical-significance testing produce numbers that inform real trading decisions — a wrong backtest is financially harmful downstream
External broker API integration: Fyers historical REST client reuses live broker credentials (token in broker_tokens) and performs authenticated outbound calls

New public-facing API surface likely: a backtest-trigger endpoint on the unauthenticated single-instance Fastify server is resource-intensive (expensive, long-running) and a DoS / resource-exhaustion vector
Writes to TimescaleDB hypertables (market_ticks / option_ticks / straddle_snapshots) — idempotency and time-range discipline are correctness-critical
notes: auth risk flag NOT APPLICABLE per .claude/project/business.md (single-instance tool, no per-user accounts).
pricing tag NOT set — M3 touches no payment/billing code; pricing-reviewer does not run.
Forward dependencies: T-51 needs T-27 (personality router, M2 — NOT built); T-58 per-regime needs T-33 (regime tagging, M4 — NOT built). Surfaced as Gate-1 decisions.
Lane fail-safe applied: HIGH risk + financial-logic + public-facing-api risk flags => feature-full, security-auditor mandatory at Opus/max.
